ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor (e.g., street address, park name) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the sensor location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the sensor location */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance check */,
  "sensor_model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "data_collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the sensor collects data (e.g., every 15 minutes, hourly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the reading */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the day (0-23) when the reading was taken */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation in mm */,
  "windspeed" REAL /* Wind speed in km/h */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity as a percentage */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility in meters */,
  "ozone" REAL /* Ozone level in ppb */,
  "pm10" REAL /* Particulate matter (PM10) in μg/m³ */,
  "pm2.5" REAL /* Particulate matter (PM2.5) in μg/m³ */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Exact timestamp when the reading was taken */,
  "sensor_status" TEXT /* Status of the sensor during the reading (e.g., normal, malfunction) */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Battery level of the sensor at the time of the reading (if applicable) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the data to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readings_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor location for which the forecast was generated */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date for which the forecast was generated */,
  "aqi" INTEGER /* Air Quality Index (AQI) value */,
  "category" TEXT /* Air quality category (e.g., Good, Moderate, Unhealthy) */,
  "forecast_timestamp" TEXT /* Exact timestamp when the forecast was generated */,
  "forecast_model" TEXT /* Model used to generate the forecast */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the forecast (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "source_data_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data used to generate the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Detailed permissions for the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
